messages.content: Can I ask, if you have decided yet, what the actual process will be? Will you run the cheatsheet against the complete evaluation set in one pass, multiple passes or on subsets? Will each run treat each problem as a fresh instance, each run as a fresh instance? Have you formally defined 'human readable'?

@_**Paul Buchanan|93** [said](https://zulip.sair.foundation/#narrow/channel/13-Math-Distillation-Challenge---equational-theories/topic/Evaluation.20Process/near/1277):
```quote
Can I ask, if you have decided yet, what the actual process will be? Will you run the cheatsheet against the complete evaluation set in one pass, multiple passes or on subsets? Will each run treat each problem as a fresh instance, each run as a fresh instance? Have you formally defined 'human readable'?
```

I think they said April 10th there will be the official rules guidelines posted, I too am curious how ones sheet size and output solution speeds will be considered vs others.
